note: Recovery now reuses the original clientImpl and its pinned read root instead of constructing a new client from the possibly moved symlink cwd; covered by TestSend_RecoveryPreservesCapturedReadRootForSymlinkCwd.

ReadTextFile now opens files through a pinned os.Root after root-relative resolution, eliminating the validation-to-open symlink escape race while preserving deterministic outside-root/path-escape errors.
Recovery preserves the captured canonical read root by keeping the same clientImpl across reopened ACP sessions; it no longer re-canonicalizes the original cwd during recovery.
Added fake-agent ReadTextFile callback coverage through the ACP transport in TestOpen_ReadTextFileUsesSessionCwdRoot, including inside reads, direct outside-root denial, and symlink escape denial.
